productDisplayName: Nautica Men Black Dial Chronograph Watch
description: Case style: Analog watch with a steel round case Dial style: Black dial with white hands Strap style: Steel strap with a butterfly clasp Features: Three chronograph time displays and date apeture on the dial Water resistance up to 100 meters, wearable around sinks, during swimming, poolside diving but not highboard diving and surfing Warranty: 1 year
